violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Establishment must label all spray bottles New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by an accumulation of droppings in the dry storage closet. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings using appropriate means of sanitization. Establishment is to continue to work with pest control, and is to increase pest control as frequently as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2026
Establishment is lacking drain plugs for the 3-bay sink. Establishment is to obtain drain plugs. New Violation. Correct By: 05/12/2026
Prep table located in the front area was not in good repair, observed laminate peeling with missing sections. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
